target: 8. Talks from Years Ahead

Ah~ I'm hungry~
I'll make Shinpei's curry when I get back.

Hey, I just got back today, you know?
You dragged me all over the island and now you want me to make food?
That's nothing. You're just tired from leaving the island, right?
You know…

Well, if you don't want to, that's fine.
Ah, I've been wanting to eat Shinpei's curry again.

Okay, okay.
But you should help out too.

Yay~!
I'll look forward to it~

She's really spoiled by her older sister.
Hey, Kaori-chan.
Hehe, that's true…
(Yes, ever since that time…)

(That's why… today was good.
The time capsule wasn't found…)
(But…)
(That time capsule contained a… <color=#GF_TIPS_074>love letter</color> for Shinpei.)

(I wrote it with all my heart, but in the end, I couldn't deliver it.
I didn't have the courage back then.)

(Now that I've grown up, maybe I can deliver it…
That's why I put it in that box.)
(But… I already knew, me.)

(It's certain that even when I grow up, that day will never come.
Because…)
(Because Shinpei's eyes were always on Ushio.)
(I think I knew that even when I grew up, it wouldn't change…)
(If by some chance, the day comes to open the time capsule…)
(What would I say to Shinpei then?)

This feeling…
How many more years will it take to let it go?
Huh, did you say something?
Nope, nothing at all!
